programme.desc: A magic movie ticket transports a young fan onto the screen with his action hero, but things blow up when a notorious movie villain uses the ticket to break into the real world.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: Marshal Gerard leads the hunt by initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. This film is packed with suspense, action and daring twists.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men
programme.desc: When a lonely, flamboyant, middle-aged widow moves in across the street from them, the male rivalry between two neighbours begins.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: America's grooviest family are back in this big-screen adaptation of the long-running television series. The Bradys must save their home from foreclosure after a tax delinquency notice.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on actual events. When his girlfriend, Cari, starts sending him demanding messages Dave decides to break it off. Shortly after, Cari disappears and the police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her mother, a girl helps an unorthodox police detective with his investigation by searching her home for clues to crack the case.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Holiday In Santa Fe
programme.desc: Siblings Tony and Magdalena help run a family-owned holiday ornament making and decor business in Santa Fe, but when matriarch Milagro passes, the family struggles to find its heart.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 2
programme.desc: Police rush to the Murdaugh home after Alex Murdaugh reports his wife, Maggie, and son Paul dead. With police and press digging into Alex's life for leads, he attempts to derail their investigation.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Circle Of Deception
programme.desc: A small island community is turned upside down when one of the town's citizens, Russel Douglas, is found dead the day after Christmas.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: Big Driver
programme.desc: A mystery writer stranded on a stretch of New England road is offered assistance by another driver. She quickly discovers her saviour is actually her assailant - and a killer.

programme.title: Girl in Room 13
programme.desc: Grace becomes addicted to opioids after suffering a sports injury. She's ready to leave her addiction behind under her mother's watch, but Richie kidnaps her to sell her into human trafficking.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.title: Love and Friendship
programme.desc: A beautiful young widow visits her in-laws' estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: Charles Darwin struggles to find a balance between his ideas of evolution and his relationship with his devout wife.

programme.title: Tea with the Dames
programme.desc: Four old friends will reflect on their lives and careers, as they spend a weekend together at the retreat once shared by Joan Plowright and Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: A Long Way Down
programme.desc: Four people considering ending their own lives suddenly find a little sunshine when they come together on New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.title: McKellen: Playing the Part
programme.desc: Built upon a 14-hour interview, this film is a unique journey through the key landmarks of McKellen's life.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Action. Paul Giamatti, James Purefoy, Kate Mara and Brian Cox star in this rollicking Robin Hood-style adventure.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 96 hours before D-day.

programme.title: Vita and Virginia
programme.desc: In 1920's, London, Virginia Wolf meets fellow author Vita Sackville-West. Despite both of them being married, they embark on an affair that later inspires a novel.

programme.title: Monster-In-Law

programme.title: Anyone But You

programme.title: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: An affable, modern-day treasure hunter neglects his marriage in pursuit of finding a legendary priceless treasure that was lost at sea many years ago.

programme.title: Greatest Days

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give

programme.title: Open Season 3
programme.desc: Boog plans a hunting trip for his woodland buddies but they can't attend, making Boog take a trip on his own.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Open Season 3
programme.desc: Boog plans a hunting trip for his woodland buddies but they can't attend, making Boog take a trip on his own.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: When Lt Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported to a new world, they engage in a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Peter Parker's vacation plans are scrapped when he agrees to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of several elemental creature attacks, creating havoc across the continent.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Alexander
programme.desc: The towering, true story of Alexander the Great, who, in the 4th century BC, conquered Greece, Persia, Afghanistan and India - 90 percent of the 'known world'.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent is crushed when his wife and children are killed after witnessing a mafia hit. With nothing left to live for he becomes The Punisher, a one-man judge, jury, and executioner.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: A group of European mercenaries become embroiled in the defense of the Great Wall of China in this epic adventure.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and their mates travel to Thailand for Stu's subdued pre-wedding brunch after the unforgettable bachelor party in Vegas. However, things don't go to plan.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: What's a couple of stay-at-home ghosts to do when their beloved home is taken over by yuppies? They call on Beetlejuice, the afterlife's freelance bio-exorcist, to scare off the family.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, Sonny Koufax is a carefree slob trying to save his love life by becoming responsible. He gets the chance when a cute kid turns up needing a father.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.

programme.title: Deuce Bigalow: European Gigolo
programme.desc: Deuce's European vacation riot goes from gigolo school in England to Amsterdam. He's on the trail of a killer who's knocking off the city's greatest gigolos.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: CHIPS
programme.desc: When an inexperienced rookie and a hardened pro in the Highway Patrol are teamed together, they clash more than click, kick-starting a partnership that is easier said than done.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and their mates travel to Thailand for Stu's subdued pre-wedding brunch after the unforgettable bachelor party in Vegas. However, things don't go to plan.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: Tormented by their self-centred and cruel employers, three friends see no way of escaping but to kill their bosses, but carrying out their plans proves to be trickier than they thought.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: When Ron Burgundy is told he will be working with a young, ambitious newswoman, it turns to war.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Can a clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: At the biggest nuptials of the year, John breaks the wedding crashing rules and falls for the daughter of the US Secretary of Treasury. Jeremy is left at the mercy of her stage-five-clinger sister.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd, a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly.

programme.title: I'll See You In My Dreams
programme.desc: With the support of three loyal girlfriends, Carol decides to embrace the world, pursue a new love interest and reconnect with her daughter.

programme.title: The Mexican
programme.desc: Before a reckless criminal can make amends with his girlfriend, he has to take one more wild ride down to Mexico to pick up a priceless antique pistol and settle his debts.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: A contemporary Southern wife and mother has the 'perfect life'. But when she learns that her husband has been unfaithful, she steps back and examines her life from a new perspective.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Tin Cup
programme.desc: A washed-up golf pro takes one last shot at the US Open to win a heart and prove to himself that he's not a loser.

programme.title: Here and Now
programme.desc: A singer in New York gets a grim diagnosis that puts her life and dreams into perspective.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: David rents an apartment and wants to be left alone. When the spirit of Elizabeth shows up and insists the apartment is hers, he agrees to help her find out who she was.

programme.title: Leatherheads
programme.desc: Set during America's pro football league in 1925, dangerous elements are creeping into the game: love and rules.

programme.title: Something New
programme.desc: A corporate lawyer finds love in the most unexpected place when she agrees to go on a blind date with a sexy and free-spirited landscaper.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: 8 Mile
programme.desc: For Jimmy Smith Jr, life is a daily fight just to keep hope alive.
Aiming for one of the most famed records in sports history, a pair of very different baseball players hit home runs at an impressive rate.

programme.title: Joe's Palace
programme.desc: Stephen Poliakoff's story of the relationship between Elliot, a wealthy Londoner, and Joe, a teenager who tends to Elliot's empty house, and of Elliot's fear that his father was a Nazi.

programme.title: Native Son
programme.desc: A young African-American man's dalliance with a wealthy white family takes a disastrous turn in this modern re-imagining of Richard Wright's haunting novel.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music, through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: 8 Mile
programme.desc: For Jimmy Smith Jr, life is a daily fight just to keep hope alive.

programme.title: The Guernsey Literary & Potato Peel P...
programme.desc: Set in the late 1940s, journalist Juliet Ashton receives a letter from Dawsey Adams and learns the existence of The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society.

programme.title: Dream Horse
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jan Vokes, a Welsh cleaner and bartender, who decides to breed and raise a racehorse.

programme.title: Victoria & Abdul
programme.desc: The extraordinary true story of the amazing and unlikely friendship between Queen Victoria and a clerk, Abdul Karim, who becomes her teacher, spiritual adviser, and devoted friend.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life to the expense of his regular one.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula, the vampire doomed as a creature of the night after forsaking God, is aroused by the image of a woman resembling his lost love.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: A quiet banker, wrongly accused of murder, is sentenced to life in a brutal prison. He maintains hope amid despair with the help of a fellow prisoner.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: In the year 1971, San Francisco faces the terror of a maniac known as Scorpio, who snipes at innocent victims and demands ransom through notes left at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Memphis Belle
programme.desc: In 1943, the crew of a B-17 based in the UK prepares for its 25th and final bombing mission over Germany before returning home to the USA.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Mary, a dutiful preacher's wife and mother of three, becomes the prime suspect in her husband's murder. What went on behind this perfect family's closed doors? Based on a true story.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: Alice was married to a deranged, abusive man: a police officer who was regarded as a pillar of the community, but was secretly a monster.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: Stalkers
programme.desc: Frustrated with the judicial system's indifference towards stalking cases, A.D.A Julia Winston is determined to establish a task force charged with tracking and prosecuting predators.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter was like a knight in shining armour when he met flight attendant Grace Tanner and swept her into a passionate love affair. But her dream man quickly became her nightmare.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: A small-town minister is accused of the deaths of two beloved parishioners when evidence surfaces that the family wasn't quite as perfect as they appeared.

programme.title: Liz & Dick
programme.desc: A chronicle of the fiery, legendary, on-again off-again romance between Hollywood stars Elizabeth Taylor and Richard Burton.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: Vita and Virginia
programme.desc: In 1920's, London, Virginia Wolf meets fellow author Vita Sackville-West. Despite both of them being married, they embark on an affair that later inspires a novel.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveller, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attache for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.title: Versus: The Life & Films of Ken Loach (2
programme.desc: Ken Loach reflects on his 50-year career in socially aware dramas and documentaries, sharing successes, controversies, and personal challenges with insights from friends and family.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 96 hours before D-day.

programme.title: Vita and Virginia
programme.desc: In 1920's, London, Virginia Wolf meets fellow author Vita Sackville-West. Despite both of them being married, they embark on an affair that later inspires a novel.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveller, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attache for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A lovesick young woman searches for the father of her unborn child in seedy Birmingham and becomes involved with a mysterious catering manager.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, rely on skill, business acumen, and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.desc: Adapted from F. Scott Fitzgerald's quirky tale. Born in his '80s Benjamin attempts to meet the love of his life before he regresses to childhood.

programme.title: Pride And Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: For the Bennets, life is uneventful until the arrival of the rich gentleman Mr Bingley. Love is soon in the air for one of the sisters, while another may have jumped to a hasty prejudgement.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: In this visually stunning musical, a small-town singer moves to the big city for her chance at stardom and becomes enchanted by Burlesque, a glamorous nightclub.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: A humorous, intertwining tale of love won and lost when Cupid strikes on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: Its 1962 - the '50s are out and change is in the air. Tracey Turnblad, a big girl with big hair and an even bigger heart who only has one passion - dancing - wins a spot on a local TV dance program.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life to the expense of his regular one.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: The Guernsey Literary & Potato Peel P...
programme.desc: Set in the late 1940s, journalist Juliet Ashton receives a letter from Dawsey Adams and learns the existence of The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society.

programme.title: Dream Horse
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jan Vokes, a Welsh cleaner and bartender, who decides to breed and raise a racehorse.

programme.title: In the Gloaming
programme.desc: Thirty-three-year-old AIDS sufferer Danny returns to his parents' home to spend his final days in the New York suburbs.

programme.title: Victoria & Abdul
programme.desc: The extraordinary true story of the amazing and unlikely friendship between Queen Victoria and a clerk, Abdul Karim, who becomes her teacher, spiritual adviser, and devoted friend.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life to the expense of his regular one.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: Contact (1997)
programme.desc: Astronomer Ellie Arroway is a scientist who finds evidence of extra-terrestrial life and is chosen to make first contact.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while thwarting her rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: In this inspiring true story of high school basketball coach, Ken Carter, who benched his winning team in order to teach his players the value of education.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: Harvard undergrad and computer genius Mark Zuckerberg's global social network heralded a revolution in communications, but his success leads to personal and legal complications.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: In the year 1971, San Francisco faces the terror of a maniac known as Scorpio, who snipes at innocent victims and demands ransom through notes left at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Memphis Belle
programme.desc: In 1943, the crew of a B-17 based in the UK prepares for its 25th and final bombing mission over Germany before returning home to the USA.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Friends compare their '60s ideas with the harsh reality of their lives in the '80s, and discover that in a cold world, you need your friends to keep you warm.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor finds success, love and frustration when he gets the role of his life, playing a woman.

programme.title: Lansky
programme.desc: A fact-based account of the life and times of mobster Meyer Lansky, including his success in gambling and racketeering.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: Jingle Belle
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Isabelle and Mike once rocked the annual Christmas Pageant. Years later, when Isabelle returns home, she is shocked to learn that Mike now directs the show.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with the charming Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger and darker as time passes.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: My Christmas Prince
programme.desc: A teacher returns to her home town, where she is joined by her boyfriend and learns that he is the crown prince of Madelvia.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: Dying For A Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods begins to get disturbing messages from one of her fans, causing her to seek help from a security influencer. Things are fine until Kara's stalker shows up in person.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric grief stricken mourners.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: An inspiration film that explores the brilliance of a mathematician that many believed could decipher the very fabric of the universe - possibly existence itself.

programme.title: Bright Young Things
programme.desc: A look at the upper crust British society during the frenzied 1930s and follows the lives of young socialites known as the 'Bright Young Things'.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: Global affairs are juggled with the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders Franklin D. Roosevelt as he hosts the English royals for an unforgettable weekend in upstate NY.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: When a series of brutal murders occur in London, the community believes that a legendary dark creature must be responsible.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centered on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric grief stricken mourners.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: After murdering the King of Scotland and taking the throne, Macbeth begins to unravel as he becomes consumed with paranoia and guilt.

programme.title: Calvary
programme.desc: In this compelling drama, a compassionate priest and estranged father confronts his own demons as he senses the menacing forces of his scornful parish closing in around him.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope.

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: Charles Darwin struggles to find a balance between his ideas of evolution and his relationship with his devout wife.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: From the producers of Shaun of the Dead and Hot Fuzz, Attack the Block follows a gang of tough inner-city kids who try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures.

programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: After Bullwinkle drinks a monster serum, he can't control when he turns into a big hairy monster, so he and Rocky go on the run from angry mobs and internet celebrities.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle and Rocky fly to a mysterious monster-inhabited island to meet the missing mad scientist that created the serum that turned Bullwinkle into a monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Raa Raa wants a partner to dance a noisy stompy dance with. All the animals have their own way of dancing, apart from Zebby who says she is too shy to dance, or is she?

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Raa Raa has decided that the Jingly Jangly Jungle is not jingly or jangly enough. He and his friends make lots of noise, but soon learn that they need to work together to make a jingly jangly noise.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Topsy reads Zebby a nap-time story. Raa Raa wants to make the noises to go with the story, but they are all too loud and Zebby can't get to sleep. Can Raa Raa find any quiet, sleepy noises in the jungle?

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Ooo Ooo is having a banana party. Raa Raa and the others have picked masses of lovely bananas, but how are they going to transport them back to Ooo Ooo's in time for the party?

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman discovers a popped tyre on his toy ambulance. Assuming that someone did it on purpose, Melman enlists Marty and the gang in a noir-like search to find the misbehaving tyre-popper.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang get some critter cards, NYC's latest toy craze and Gloria is determined to collect them all. But when Gloria loses Melman's rare and special card, the gang goes on an adventure to get it back.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Tricky Tracker
programme.desc: Alf's homing pigeon Cedric is taking part in a big race, and Pat has to deliver a special tracking device for Alf to attach to Cedric. Time is short, so Pat's in a hurry.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Greendale Ukulele Big Band
programme.desc: Pat delivers a big box of lovely ukuleles for Reverend Timms' Ukulele Big Band. Everyone's getting one, but as Pat delivers them, he finds out that they all have a little problem.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Tremendous Tree
programme.desc: Pat has a very unusual delivery: an enormous tree, which Alf has ordered for Thompson Ground. Very tricky indeed to transport, Pat has strapped it into the 4WD and is driving very slowly.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Great Greendale Website
programme.desc: Pat's mission is to collect donations towards the brand new Greendale website. There's lots and lots to do and all kinds of obstacles for Pat along the way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it the Kelp way.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear

programme.title: Little Charley Bear

programme.title: Little Charley Bear

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: An assassin with a peerless reputation for lethal efficiency finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims.

programme.title: Ammonite

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: Charles Darwin struggles to find a balance between his ideas of evolution and his relationship with his devout wife.

programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to transform his appearance. However, his dream face quickly becomes a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: The Crime Is Mine
programme.desc: In Paris, 1935, a young actress has just been acquitted of murdering a famous French producer. Is she really innocent, or has she gotten away with murder?

programme.title: YOLO
programme.desc: After an argument with her younger sister, Le Ying moves out on her own. She meets a boxing trainer and starts boxing.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: The ultimate David versus Goliath story about the insane true story of everyday people who flipped the script on Wall Street and got rich by turning GameStop into the world's hottest company.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The Bad Boys are back, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original group's way of life.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter and teamup with Mad Max.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
programme.desc: A naval officer stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he feels is acting in an unstable way, putting in danger both the ship and its crew.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born one minute apart, leading very different lives. Years later, they reconnect and wonder if it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Jules realises she's in love with her best friend, who's about to marry someone else. She'll do anything to steal him away, except tell him the truth.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd, a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world. After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, they worry that they've lost their harmony for good.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Champs, the Bellas found themselves split apart and jobless. But when they get their chance for one last tour, they come together again.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Sex and the City
programme.desc: Carrie Bradshaw, a successful author, and her fashion icon friends continue to juggle jobs and relationships while navigating motherhood, marriage and Manhattan real estate.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: In this third instalment, Bridget's single life and career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant and unable to identify her baby's father.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When they make a three-hour sex tape to spice up their love life, a husband and wife realise they're in trouble when the epic recording threatens to go viral! A delightfully crude comedy.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for the true love she left behind.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: It's 1985 and Adam Sandler is Robbie Hart, the ultimate master of ceremonies, until he is left at the altar at his own wedding.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: A feature adaption of "The Band" musical, featuring songs of Take That.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: The Fabulous Four
programme.desc: The story of two friends who travel to be bridesmaids in a surprise wedding of their college girlfriend.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: Dora's Christmas Carol Adventure
programme.desc: Santa has warned Swiper again and again. If he keeps swiping on Christmas, he'll be permanently put on the naughty list. Will the Christmas tree star and party be ruined?

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
programme.desc: High school gets even more awkward when shy teen Ruby Gillman learns that she comes from a royal family of sea krakens and that her destiny is bigger than she ever imagined.

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: When a boy is sent to Coral Key to stay with his salty uncle for the summer, he never dreamed he would become best mates with a feisty, orphaned dolphin named Flipper.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Oink
programme.desc: A nine-year-old girl gets a pig named Oink as a gift from her grandfather.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
programme.desc: The 'hood' and 'The Man' go head-to-head when Arnold and the gang try to save their tight-knit community from the bulldozer.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: In this family drama, Chrissa Maxwell moves to Minnesota where she faces bullying at her new school from the 'mean girls'. When Chrissa makes it into the swimming team, the taunting goes too far.

programme.title: Stuart Little 3: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: School's out for the summer, and the Little family is spending their vacation at a beautiful lakeside cabin. Stuart can't wait to spend his entire vacation canoeing, hiking and finding his inner scout.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: In this beloved tale, Tintin and Snowy travel the world outwitting their enemies to find the resting place of The Unicorn, a shipwreck that holds the key to a vast fortune and an ancient curse.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law Of Return
programme.desc: A squad of elite soldiers, risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met, when he's shot down flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befall their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The re-resurrected mummy of an Egyptian high priest kidnaps the son of archaeologists who first dug him up, and sets out to destroy mankind by commanding the army of the ancient Scorpion King.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: When a Persian God-King leads his troops into battle against the legendary Greeks, the only possible outcome is bloody and brutal.

programme.title: The Shallows
programme.desc: When a surfer is attacked by a great white shark 20 yards from shore, her short journey back to safety becomes the ultimate contest of wills.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Blade - half-mortal, half-immortal - fights vampires who crave his special blood type for their plan to exterminate the human race.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his new-found ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: Grizzled former professional baseball player Morris Buttermaker is recruited by a strait-laced lawyer to coach the Bears, a woefully inept Little League team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon butts heads with a new recruit, they must learn to put their differences aside after uncovering a criminal plot that threatens the future of the bay.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Meet the Parents

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: After 10 years and two little Fockers, Greg returns and is still battling his father-in-law's suspicions. Will Greg pass Jack's final test and become the family's next patriarch?

programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III

programme.title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas

programme.title: The Replacement Killers

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: In this Stephen King thriller, Dr Louis Creed is devastated when his young son is killed on the road outside his home and he turns to an ancient Indian burial ground where the dead can be resurrected.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.title: The Pentagon Wars
programme.desc: An Air Force colonel threatens to reveal the truth behind the military's $14 billion investment in a transport vehicle.

programme.title: The Dirty Dozen
programme.desc: Twelve American soldiers, all criminals, get a chance at redemption on a killing mission in World War II.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: The Inherited

programme.title: Ann Rule's Circle Of Deception

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer

programme.title: Girl in the Basement

programme.title: Maid for Revenge
